creator: jon@xyinn.org
text: I've installed/upgraded a PCIe Intel(R) X520-1 82599EN SPF+ 10GiB NIC (and a TP-Link transceiver) on the server which will replace the Realtek onboard NIC (and thus avoid this issue). I'll still have this onboard NIC available so if anyone wants me to try patches, lmk. I'll be happy to send down traffic to it.
